data.title: HAFNIA LIMITED: Ex dividend USD 0.1762 on the Oslo Stock Exchange today
data.description: Hafnia Limited (ticker code: HAFNI on OSE and HAFN on NYSE) announced details regarding the dividend for Q4 2025 on 26 Feb 2026. The shares will trade ex-dividend on the Oslo Stock Exchange starting 5 March 2026 and on the New York Stock Exchange from 6 March 2026. Hafnia Limited is a leading global company in the industry.

data.title: Anthony Scaramucci Says Kraken Evolving Into Something 'Much Bigger' After Crypto Exchange Makes History: They Are 'Quietly' Building
data.description: SkyBridge Capital founder and prominent Bitcoin advocate, Anthony Scaramucci, praised Kraken on Wednesday following the news that the cryptocurrency exchange had obtained a Federal Reserve master account. Scaramucci emphasized that Kraken is expanding into a "much bigger" entity, attributing this growth to strategic acquisitions, organic development, and the recent approval granting direct access to Fedwire. By securing this approval, Kraken now has direct access to the core payment infrastructure utilized by numerous U.S. financial institutions. Scaramucci described Kraken as transitioning from being a top choice for crypto traders to becoming a significant player in the industry. He symbolized Kraken's progress by using an octopus emoji, which represents flexibility and adaptability. Through a combination of acquisitions, organic growth, and the approval for Fed payments, Kraken is steadily establishing itself as a major player in the crypto exchange realm.

data.title: New survey demonstrates how diabetes limits day-to-day freedom for people around the world and highlights need for predictive tools
data.description: A recent worldwide study of 4,326 individuals diagnosed with diabetes reveals the substantial negative impact of managing the condition on daily life. The majority of participants highlighted the mental burden and unpredictability associated with constantly planning around factors such as blood glucose levels, meal timing, and medication schedules.

data.title: Global Times: China has set an economic growth target of 4.5 percent to 5 percent this year. How should we view it?
data.description: On March 5, 2026, in Beijing, a key point was made regarding growth targets. The focus is on providing guidance and direction rather than predicting outcomes. The main factors taken into account are needs and opportunities. The goal is to maintain steady growth within a specific range and attain positive results.

data.title: Global Times: 4.5%-5%: Understanding the 'progress' and 'stability' in China's economic target
data.description: In Beijing on March 5, 2026, China commenced its "national two sessions." The recently revealed GDP growth target for the upcoming year has once more emerged as a crucial indicator in shaping global public perception of the world economy. This figure is closely watched internationally, with experts analyzing it to gauge the economic trajectory.

data.title: Gaotu Techedu Announces Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Unaudited Financial Results
data.description: On March 5, 2026, Gaotu Techedu Inc. (NYSE: GOTU), a prominent tech-based education firm in China specializing in AI-driven lifelong learning solutions, disclosed its unaudited fourth-quarter financial results.

data.title: Crypto charity on rise: Giving Block sees $100M+ stablecoin donations to charities in 2025, due to US law changes.
data.description: In 2025, the fundraising platform Giving Block announced that it had facilitated over $100 million in donations of stablecoins to charitable organizations. This significant increase in donations may have been influenced by recent changes in US legislation.

data.title: BioVersys to Report Its Full Year 2025 Financial Results, Provide a Business Update and Host a Conference Call
data.description: Swiss-based BioVersys AG (SIX: BIOV), a clinical stage biopharmaceutical firm specializing in developing innovative antibacterial solutions for severe infections from multidrug-resistant (MDR) bacteria, disclosed its Full Year 2025 financial outcomes in Basel. The company also provided a business overview and intends to conduct a conference call for investors, analysts, and media representatives to discuss the results and updates.
WISeKey discloses provisional FY 2025 financial figures.

data.title: D-Link Makes Wi-Fi 7 Practical for Modern Homes and Flexible Broadband Access
data.description: D-Link Corporation has unveiled its latest Wi-Fi and 5G-Series products on March 5, 2026, in Taipei. The company's focus is on ensuring that Wi-Fi 7 upgrades are easy to access and suitable for modern lifestyles. This move aims to provide flexible broadband options for users. By prioritizing accessibility and practicality, D-Link aims to enhance the everyday user experience.

data.title: The Estée Lauder Companies and Forest Essentials to Enter a New Chapter in Their Long-Term Partnership
data.description: In a recent announcement, The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) revealed their plans to acquire the remaining stakes in Forest Essentials, a popular Indian beauty brand that focuses on modern Luxurious Ayurveda. The agreement, contingent upon regulatory clearances, highlights Estée Lauder's dedication to expanding the brand further. Over the course of their 18-year partnership, Estée Lauder has developed a strong relationship with Forest Essentials, and this acquisition underscores their commitment to fostering and developing this unique Indian beauty brand.
